name: ExtensionMedicationKnowledge_Packaging_PackagedProduct
title: R5: The packaged medication that is being priced (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `MedicationKnowledge.packaging.packagedProduct` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`MedicationKnowledge.packaging.packagedProduct` 0..1 `Reference(http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/PackagedProductDefinition)`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `MedicationKnowledge.packaging.packagedProduct` 0..1 `Reference(http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/PackagedProductDefinition)`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `MedicationKnowledge.packaging.packagedProduct` is part of an existing definition because parent element `MedicationKnowledge.packaging` requires an extension for additional cardinality.
Element `MedicationKnowledge.packaging.packagedProduct` has a context of MedicationKnowledge.packaging based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `MedicationKnowledge`.
Element `MedicationKnowledge.packaging.packagedProduct` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: The packaged medication that is being priced
element.definition: A reference to a PackagedProductDefinition that provides the details of the product that is in the packaging and is being priced.
